layout_notes: The page is a graphical instrument-panel harness layout. Connector callouts, connector shapes, cavity numbers, leader lines, harness colors, and the panel drawing are preserved as source structure rather than converted into English prose.
Source-local connector identifiers retain printed case, including H, J, K, O and lower-case k and p prefixes.
The grid uses numeric columns 1-6 and alphabetic rows A-D.

literal_translation.reason: Grid coordinates, connector identifiers, cavity numbers, leader lines, shapes, colors, and date marks are source-local notation rather than Japanese prose.
